LocaleResource.Name: XcellenceIT.Plugin.ProductRibbons.Fields.CSSProductBoxSelector.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: CSS selector for the product box. The product box is used for listing products on pages like category page, manufacturer page, home page, etc.

LocaleResource.Name: XcellenceIT.Plugin.ProductRibbons.Fields.CSSProductPagePicturesParentContainerSelector.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: CSS The selector for the parent container of the product picture located on the product page. It is used by the integration of the plugin for displaying the product picture ribbon

LocaleResource.Name: XcellenceIT.Plugin.ProductRibbons.Fields.SpecificationAttributeId.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Select Specification Attribute which is associated with Product Stock Status.

LocaleResource.Name: XcellenceIT.Plugin.ProductRibbons.Fields.StockStatusRImage.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Selected Image will display for product Stock Status 'R'.

LocaleResource.Name: XcellenceIT.Plugin.ProductRibbons.Fields.StockStatusGImage.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Selected Image will display for product Stock Status 'G'.

LocaleResource.Name: XcellenceIT.Plugin.ProductRibbons.Fields.StockStatusBImage.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Selected Image will display for product Stock Status 'B'.

LocaleResource.Name: XcellenceIT.Plugin.ProductRibbons.Fields.StockStatusOImage.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Selected Image will display for product Stock Status 'O'.

LocaleResource.Name: XcellenceIT.Plugin.ProductRibbons.RibbonName.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: The name of the product ribbon.

LocaleResource.Name: XcellenceIT.Plugin.ProductRibbons.StartDateUtc.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Set the date from which this product ribbon will be displayed (UTC time).

LocaleResource.Name: XcellenceIT.Plugin.ProductRibbons.EndDateUtc.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Set the date till which this product ribbon will be displayed (UTC time).

LocaleResource.Name: XcellenceIT.Plugin.ProductRibbons.DisplayOrder.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: NOTE: A lower number is a higher priority! Set the priority of the product ribbon. If two or more product ribbons match then display both in Product.

LocaleResource.Name: XcellenceIT.Plugin.ProductRibbons.ApplyToAllProduct.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Check/Unchecked to enable/disable apply ribbon to all products or not.

LocaleResource.Name: XcellenceIT.Plugin.ProductRibbons.MarkAsNew.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Check/Unchecked to enable/disable then ribbon will apply on mark as new product(apply on new product)

LocaleResource.Name: XcellenceIT.Plugin.ProductRibbons.IsMoreRibbonDisplayAfterThis
LocaleResource.Value: Do not Display More ribbon after this

LocaleResource.Name: XcellenceIT.Plugin.ProductRibbons.IsMoreRibbonDisplayAfterThis.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: If checked no more ribbons will be added to a product after this ribbon is added. Do not check if there will be multiple ribbons list on product.

LocaleResource.Name: XcellenceIT.Plugin.ProductRibbons.Enabled.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Check/Unchecked to enable/disable this product ribbon.

LocaleResource.Name: XcellenceIT.Plugin.ProductRibbons.Enabled.Search.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Check to View only Enable Product Ribbon.

LocaleResource.Name: XcellenceIT.Plugin.ProductRibbons.Notification.add
LocaleResource.Value: The record has been saved successfully.

LocaleResource.Name: XcellenceIT.Plugin.ProductRibbons.Notification.update
LocaleResource.Value: The record has been updated successfully.

LocaleResource.Name: XcellenceIT.Plugin.ProductRibbons.Notification.Deleted
LocaleResource.Value: The record has been deleted successfully.

LocaleResource.Name: XcellenceIT.Plugin.ProductRibbons.EndDateUtc.GreaterThenStartDate
LocaleResource.Value: End date must be greater then start date.

LocaleResource.Name: XcellenceIT.Plugin.ProductRibbons.StoreIds.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Option to limit this Deal to a certain store. If you have multiple stores, choose one or several from the list. If you don't use this option just leave this field empty.

LocaleResource.Name: XcellenceIT.Plugin.ProductRibbons.Fields.RibbonText.Hint
LocaleResource.Value:
Specify the text of the ribbon. This text will appear over the product image.
Leave empty if you use a ribbon picture that contains text.
You can use the Available Product Tokens here i.e "${max-discount-percentage} OFF" or "-${max-discount-percentage}"

LocaleResource.Name: XcellenceIT.Plugin.ProductRibbons.Fields.Position.Hint
LocaleResource.Value:
The default location where the ribbon will appear relative to the picture of the product.
You can customize further with the styles below if needed.

LocaleResource.Name: XcellenceIT.Plugin.ProductRibbons.Fields.PictureId.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Insert ribbon picture. Do not insert the picture twice!!!

LocaleResource.Name: XcellenceIT.Plugin.ProductRibbons.Fields.TextStyleCss.Hint
LocaleResource.Value:
Here you can specify css styles that will be applied only to the ribbon text (label) element.
The ribbon text is an label html element that is nested inside the ribbon element.

LocaleResource.Name: XcellenceIT.Plugin.ProductRibbons.Fields.ImageStyleCss.Hint
LocaleResource.Value:
Here you can specify css styles that will be applied only to the ribbon image (img) element.
The ribbon image html element is nested inside the ribbon element.

LocaleResource.Name: XcellenceIT.Plugin.ProductRibbons.Fields.ContainerStyleCss.Hint
XcellenceIT.Plugin.ProductRibbons.tab.Products.SaveBeforeEdit
LocaleResource.Value: You need to save the Deal before you can add products for this Deal page.
